name: Adversary-in-the-Middle Infrastructure Detected
description: Detects configuration activities for adversary-in-the-middle (AiTM) infrastructure. This activity can indicate an attempt to establish a control point to intercept or manipulate traffic.

prompts.prompt: A critical alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: a potential **Adversary-in-the-Middle (AiTM)** infrastructure setup was detected. The activity was recorded as a server creation with the role of a 'man-in-the-middle' proxy. The configuration was initiated by user **{user}** from the source address **{source_address}**. This is a strong indicator of **Resource Development** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1583.004**) and a severe security incident. Immediate action is required to investigate this activity and block the source address. This could be part of a larger attack aimed at stealing credentials or bypassing multi-factor authentication.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the activity was detected.

parameters.name: source_address
parameters.description: The source IP address from which the configuration was initiated.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that performed the configuration.

parameters.name: role
parameters.description: The role of the configured server (e.g., 'mitm').
